message:
feat(html-export): Enhance daemon client and improve HTML export rendering

Expands daemon client functionality with improved connection handling and
response parsing, making the background search service more robust. Updates
HTML export scripts and styles to improve interactivity and visual consistency
across exported conversation files.

- Enhance daemon client with better error handling and retry logic (115 LOC)
- Improve HTML export scripts for better user interaction (34 LOC)
- Refine export styles for consistent theming and readability (16 LOC)
- Update bakeoff module with improved comparison logic (18 LOC)
- Add documentation in README for new features

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2506,6 +2506,13 @@ cargo test --test e2e_index_tui
 cargo test --test install_scripts
 ```
 
+### HTML Export E2E Logging
+
+Playwright E2E runs emit a setup metadata file at `tests/e2e/exports/setup-metadata.json` and
+export its path as `TEST_EXPORT_SETUP_LOG` in `tests/e2e/.env.test`. On failures, tests attach
+per-test browser logs (console/pageerror/requestfailed). Set `E2E_LOG_ALWAYS=1` to attach logs
+for every test.
+
 ### Release Build Optimizations
 
 The release profile is aggressively optimized for binary size and performance:

@@ -140,3 +140,13 @@ cargo audit
 - RUSTSEC-2024-0436: `paste 1.0.15` (unmaintained) via `tokenizers`/`macro_rules_attribute`
 - RUSTSEC-2024-0320: `yaml-rust 0.4.5` (unmaintained) via `syntect`
 - RUSTSEC-2026-0002: `lru 0.12.5` (unsound) via `tantivy`
+
